event_name_from_dg: the Memorial Tournament presented by Workday
explanation: OMNIA ran Monday 2026-06-08. DataGolf's betting-tools/outrights endpoint is still serving Memorial Tournament odds (last_updated 2026-06-07 03:36 UTC). RBC Canadian Open odds typically post Tuesday morning ET. Computed edges would mislead downstream consumers because the market prices are for the wrong event. Will refresh on next scheduled run (Tue 08:00 ET) or any manual re-run after DG rotates odds.
next_action: Wait for DG outrights endpoint to return event_name='RBC Canadian Open', then re-run OMNIA.
